title: MemoryAuditPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `memory_audit` event — ai-core's detection of missed sensitivity tagging. Local-only by protocol (§3 of spec/memory-delta-v1.md §5.6).

items.description: Sensitivity classification used by sync forwarders to decide whether to redact memory content before crossing a device boundary. Emitter-authored; not forwarder-mutable.

missed_patterns.description: Sensitivity classifications the ai-core heuristic believes apply to the current turn but weren't tagged on the resulting memory.

turn_message.description: Up to 200 characters of the triggering user message. Implementations MUST truncate at emission.
